title: Localize application to Portuguese (Brazil) and restrict timeframes to M1/M5/M10

requirements.summary: Translate all frontend user-facing text to Portuguese (Brazil)
acceptanceCriteria: All UI text throughout the application is displayed in Portuguese (Brazil)
No English text remains in buttons, titles, messages, or notifications
Translation mappings provided in the user request are applied consistently
Dashboard buttons display 'Analisar Gráfico', 'Histórico de Análises', and 'Configurações'
AI status displays 'Status da IA' with 'Ativo' when active
Results screen shows 'COMPRA' or 'VENDA' for signals
Processing stages are translated to Portuguese
Settings labels and options are in Portuguese

file_operations.description: Replace all English UI text with Portuguese translations: 'Analyze Chart' → 'Analisar Gráfico', 'Analysis History' → 'Histórico de Análises', 'Settings' → 'Configurações', 'AI System Status' → 'Status da IA', 'Active' → 'Ativo', ensuring all buttons, titles, and status indicators display in Portuguese (Brazil).

Translate all upload interface text to Portuguese: 'Upload' → 'Enviar Gráfico', file selection instructions, camera/gallery/clipboard prompts, drag-and-drop area messages, and file validation error messages to Portuguese (Brazil).

Replace all four processing stage labels with Portuguese translations: 'Loading image' → 'Carregando imagem', 'Processing data' → 'Processando dados', 'Detecting patterns' → 'Detectando padrões', 'Generating result' → 'Gerando resultado', maintaining the existing animation flow.

Translate all results screen content to Portuguese: signal labels ('Buy' → 'COMPRA', 'Sell' → 'VENDA'), 'Trend Detection' → 'Tendência', trend values ('bullish' → 'ALTA', 'bearish' → 'BAIXA', 'sideways' → 'LATERAL'), 'Confidence' → 'Confiança', pattern section headers, and all explanatory text to Portuguese (Brazil).

Translate history page text to Portuguese: 'Analysis History' → 'Histórico de Análises', empty state message prompting users to analyze their first chart, and ensure date/time formatting follows Portuguese (Brazil) conventions with localized labels.

Translate all settings labels and options to Portuguese: 'Settings' → 'Configurações', theme labels, AI sensitivity label → 'Sensibilidade da IA', timeframe label → 'Selecionar timeframe padrão', notification labels, and all other UI text to Portuguese (Brazil).
Replace signal labels with Portuguese translations: 'BUY' → 'COMPRA', 'SELL' → 'VENDA', 'HOLD' → 'MANTER', 'Confidence' → 'Confiança', ensuring all card text displays in Portuguese (Brazil).

Translate history item labels to Portuguese: trend direction values, confidence label → 'Confiança', and any other displayed text to Portuguese (Brazil), ensuring consistent translation with other components.
Translate all file upload component text to Portuguese: drag-and-drop instructions, file type restrictions, size limit messages, validation errors, and upload prompts to Portuguese (Brazil).

Translate camera component UI text to Portuguese: capture button label, camera switch button, retake button, permission error messages, and all camera-related instructions to Portuguese (Brazil). Verify the camera component's usage instructions before implementing.
Translate layout component text to Portuguese: header titles, footer text, navigation labels, and any global UI strings to Portuguese (Brazil).
Update timestamp formatting to use Portuguese (Brazil) locale, including month names, date format conventions, and AM/PM indicators translated to Portuguese equivalents.
Translate share functionality messages to Portuguese: share prompt text, copy confirmation messages, and error messages to Portuguese (Brazil).

requirements.summary: Restrict timeframe selection to only M1, M5, and M10 with M1 as default
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page timeframe selector displays only M1, M5, and M10 options with Portuguese labels
M1 is selected by default when user first accesses settings
No timeframes longer than 10 minutes are available for selection
Backend AnalysisResult includes only M1, M5, or M10 as suggested timeframes
All existing longer timeframe options are removed from the codebase

file_operations.description: Restrict timeframe selector to display only three options: 'M1 (1 minuto)', 'M5 (5 minutos)', 'M10 (10 minutos)' in Portuguese. Set M1 as the default selected value when settings are first loaded. Remove all references to longer timeframe options (15m, 30m, 1h, etc.) from the dropdown and ensure only M1, M5, M10 are selectable.
Update mock analysis result generation to only use M1, M5, or M10 as the defaultTimeframe value, ensuring no longer timeframes are generated during processing or stored in sessionStorage.

requirements.summary: Display suggested timeframe and add directional arrow symbols to signal labels on Results screen
acceptanceCriteria: Results screen shows suggested timeframe matching user's default setting from Settings
Buy signals display with '↑' arrow symbol next to 'COMPRA'
Sell signals display with '↓' arrow symbol next to 'VENDA'
Timeframe label is displayed in Portuguese (e.g., '1 minuto', '5 minutos', '10 minutos')

file_operations.description: Add display of the suggested timeframe from user's default settings (retrieved via useSettings hook), showing the timeframe in Portuguese format ('1 minuto', '5 minutos', or '10 minutos'). Add directional arrow symbols to signal labels: '↑' for buy signals next to 'COMPRA' and '↓' for sell signals next to 'VENDA'.

Add directional arrow symbols to signal labels: display '↑' arrow next to 'COMPRA' for buy signals and '↓' arrow next to 'VENDA' for sell signals, ensuring visual clarity and consistency with the Results page.

requirements.summary: Fix language to Portuguese and update Settings screen timeframe labels
acceptanceCriteria: Language selection control is removed from Settings page
Language is fixed to Portuguese (Brasil) throughout the app
Timeframe setting label reads 'Selecionar timeframe padrão'
Timeframe options display as 'M1 (1 minuto)', 'M5 (5 minutos)', 'M10 (10 minutos)'
AI sensitivity setting label reads 'Sensibilidade da IA'

file_operations.description: Remove language selection control from the Settings page UI. Update timeframe setting label to 'Selecionar timeframe padrão' and ensure options display as 'M1 (1 minuto)', 'M5 (5 minutos)', 'M10 (10 minutos)' in Portuguese. Update AI sensitivity label to 'Sensibilidade da IA'. Language is now fixed to Portuguese (Brasil) with no user selection available.

acceptanceCriteria: Processing screen displays all stage labels in Portuguese
Stage 1 shows 'Carregando imagem'
Stage 2 shows 'Processando dados'
Stage 3 shows 'Detectando padrões'
Stage 4 shows 'Gerando resultado'
Animation sequence and timing remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Update all four processing stage labels to Portuguese while maintaining the existing animation sequence and timing: Stage 1 → 'Carregando imagem', Stage 2 → 'Processando dados', Stage 3 → 'Detectando padrões', Stage 4 → 'Gerando resultado'.

Ensure ProcessingStage component properly displays Portuguese stage labels passed as props, maintaining the three visual states (inactive, active with spinner, complete with checkmark) without modification.

requirements.summary: Translate Results screen trend and pattern labels to Portuguese
acceptanceCriteria: Trend section displays 'Tendência' as the label
Trend values show 'ALTA', 'BAIXA', or 'LATERAL' in Portuguese
Detected patterns section header reads 'Padrões detectados'
Pattern names are translated to Portuguese
All explanatory text and descriptions are in Portuguese (Brazil)
Save and share button labels are in Portuguese

file_operations.description: Translate trend section label to 'Tendência' and trend values to 'ALTA' (bullish), 'BAIXA' (bearish), 'LATERAL' (sideways). Translate detected patterns section header to 'Padrões detectados' and all pattern names (hammer → 'Martelo', doji → 'Doji', engulfing → 'Envolvente', shootingStar → 'Estrela Cadente') to Portuguese. Translate save and share button labels to Portuguese and ensure all explanatory text is in Portuguese (Brazil).

requirements.summary: Translate AnalyzeChart page upload interface to Portuguese
acceptanceCriteria: Main upload button or section displays 'Enviar Gráfico'
File selection instructions are in Portuguese
Camera capture interface displays Portuguese labels
Gallery selection prompts are in Portuguese
Clipboard paste instructions are in Portuguese
Drag-and-drop area text is in Portuguese
File type and size limit messages are in Portuguese

file_operations.description: Translate upload button to 'Enviar Gráfico', file selection instructions, camera capture button labels, gallery selection prompts, clipboard paste instructions, drag-and-drop area text, file type restrictions, and size limit messages to Portuguese (Brazil).

Translate FileUpload component text to Portuguese: drag-and-drop instructions ('Arraste e solte' or equivalent), file type messages, size limit warnings, and validation error messages to Portuguese (Brazil).

Translate CameraCapture component labels and instructions to Portuguese: capture button, switch camera button (mobile only), retake button, error messages, and permission prompts to Portuguese (Brazil). Verify the camera component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Translate History page to Portuguese with localized date/time formatting
acceptanceCriteria: Page header displays 'Histórico de Análises'
Empty state message is in Portuguese
Historical analysis entries show labels in Portuguese
Date and time formatting follows Portuguese (Brazil) conventions
Signal labels in history items display 'COMPRA' or 'VENDA'

file_operations.description: Translate page header to 'Histórico de Análises', empty state message prompting users to analyze their first chart to Portuguese, and ensure all historical analysis entry labels are in Portuguese (Brazil) with proper date/time formatting.

Translate all history item labels to Portuguese: signal labels ('BUY' → 'COMPRA', 'SELL' → 'VENDA'), confidence label, trend direction values, and ensure date/time stamps use Portuguese (Brazil) formatting conventions via formatTimestamp utility.

Update timestamp formatting function to use Portuguese (Brazil) locale (pt-BR) with localized month names, date format, and time conventions, ensuring consistent date/time display throughout the History page and HistoryListItem component.

requirements.summary: Translate Dashboard page labels and AI status to Portuguese
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze chart button displays 'Analisar Gráfico'
History button displays 'Histórico de Análises'
Settings button displays 'Configurações'
AI status section shows 'Status da IA'
Active status displays 'Ativo' in Portuguese
App branding and titles are in Portuguese

file_operations.description: Translate all Dashboard labels to Portuguese: analyze chart button → 'Analisar Gráfico', history button → 'Histórico de Análises', settings button → 'Configurações', AI status section header → 'Status da IA', active status indicator → 'Ativo', and ensure all app branding and page titles are in Portuguese (Brazil).
